scenarios.capability: Chart structure and helm lint validation with missing recommended files
scenarios.reason: Agent can inspect provided chart files, identify structural gaps, and produce a findings report without executing external tools.

scenarios.capability: Security best practices audit of rendered Deployment templates
scenarios.reason: Agent can analyze provided YAML manifests for missing securityContext fields, image tag issues, and missing probes entirely from file content.

scenarios.capability: CRD detection and documentation-driven field validation
scenarios.reason: Agent can detect CRD kinds from provided YAML, identify which require documentation lookup, and flag missing required fields based on the lookup workflow.

scenarios.capability: Template rendering issue diagnosis and proposed-fix generation
scenarios.reason: Agent can read provided .yaml templates, identify Go template errors and YAML indentation issues, and propose corrected code blocks.

scenarios.capability: Full 10-stage final report with categorised issues and proposed changes
scenarios.reason: Agent can produce the mandatory Stage 10 report structure (summary table, categorised issues, proposed changes) from provided chart artefacts.
